div.head: The Minister in Bulgaria (Shoemaker) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 33. Referring Department’s telegram No. 10, November 27. Legation made representations only upon verifying costs from company, which was selling at Commission’s price, or lower, for reasons of business competition. An examination of another company’s books by an agent of the Commission within the last month revealed loss of 1½ leva per kilo.

As requested, Legation is mailing comprehensive statement of material factors to Department by pouch todayDespatch No. 324 not printed. and will request Department’s advice should further representations seem necessary.
